user_system_path: Issue #240 is the active governance-collapse seam. Issue #231 (work-state purity, owner directive) is paused and resumes immediately after #240 merges; issue #226 (rung 6 owner-path readiness) resumes after #231 is proven. Rung 7 remains forbidden until #226 is proven.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and the active issue before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Active seam: issue #240 governance collapse. Governance, docs, gates, gate tests, repo hygiene, and brand-asset moves only. No product/runtime code.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/lib/components/pages/supabase/sql changes. No Slack, auth, Stripe, or schema work. No product behavior change of any kind.
required_browser_proof: Not required — governance and repo hygiene only.
acceptance_condition: Root markdown count <= 8, boot sequence is 2 steps, gate:continuity/lint/build green, no product behavior changed.
stop_condition: Stop when the #240 PR is merged and the GitHub receipt is posted to issue #240. Next seam: reactivate issue #231, then #226.
